## Usage Notes for the Documentation Agent

- **Sections inside `AUTO-GENERATED` markers** are managed by the `update-docs` skill. Do not manually edit them; your edits will be overwritten on the next sync.
- **Sections outside the markers** are yours to maintain. The agent will never touch them.
- If you want to add a new auto-managed section, add the markers yourself and invoke `/update-docs` to populate it.
- The `{placeholder}` values in curly braces are for human authors. The agent will not fill them in — they must be written manually.
